---
id: mqtt-subscribe
title: "Get MQTT Connection Configuration"
description: "Call this API, providing the specified device ID, to obtain the necessary information for MQTT connection and topic subscription, including Client ID, MQTT host address, MQTT port, supported protocols, username, secret key, etc.<br />"
sidebar_label: "Get MQTT Connection Configuration"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get MQTT Connection Configuration"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/subscriptions/mqtt/subscribe"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Call this API, providing the specified device ID, to obtain the necessary information for MQTT connection and topic subscription, including Client ID, MQTT host address, MQTT port, supported protocols, username, secret key, etc.<br />        
Based on the returned client ID and specific rules, you can generate the corresponding topics. Together with the other returned information, use a third-party MQTT client to connect to Aqara's MQTT Broker and subscribe to these topics to receive real-time updates of the specified device's function point value changes.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"Access token obtained via authorization."},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"App ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"Key ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"Random string, should be different for each request."},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"Request timestamp in milliseconds."},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"Language, defaults to English. Supports 'zh' and 'en'."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":false,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"deviceUniqueId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID. If not configured in this field, you can also pass this information in the `Device-Unique-Id` field of the request header (Header)."},"expiresIn":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"Subscription expiration time (seconds). Valid values are [7200, 604800]; if not within the range or not provided, the default is 7200.","minimum":7200,"maximum":604800}},"title":"MqttSubscribeRequest"},"examples":{"subscribe":{"value":{"deviceUniqueId":"device-unique-id-001","expiresIn":7200}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v4"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["clientId","mqttHost","mqttPort","supportedProtocols","secretId","secretKey","expiresIn"],"properties":{"clientId":{"type":"string","description":"MQTT Client ID. After obtaining this information, please generate the corresponding topic according to the rule `receive_${clientId}`.<br />\nExample: When `clientId` is `omqt.studio_16ce93b6fc723f0d9f0dc02f4d4a2f15_123456789`, the topic is `receive_omqt.studio_16ce93b6fc723f0d9f0dc02f4d4a2f15_123456789`.\n"},"mqttHost":{"type":"string","description":"MQTT host address."},"mqttPort":{"type":"string","description":"MQTT port."},"supportedProtocols":{"type":"array","description":"Supported protocols list.","items":{"type":"string"}},"secretId":{"type":"string","description":"Base64-encoded MQTT username."},"secretKey":{"type":"string","description":"Base64-encoded MQTT secret key."},"expiresIn":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"Subscription expiration time (seconds)."}},"title":"MqttSubscribeData"}}}],"title":"MqttSubscribeResponse"},"examples":{"subscribeSuccess":{"value":{"type":"MqttSubscribeResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"2df2f431-xxxx-4fdb-xxxx-xxxxxxxx","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"clientId":"omqt.studio_16xxxxxxxxxxx9","mqttHost":"mqtt.xxx.com","mqttPort":"1883","supportedProtocols":["tcp"],"secretId":"YmFzZTY0xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxJldElk","secretKey":"YmFzZTY0xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxleQ==","expiresIn":7200}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request Parameter Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx cannot be empty"},"description":"Error response.
